description: To prevent 'buddy punching' and off-site time tracking, restrict web punches so they are only accepted from the static IP addresses of the Headquarters and the Warehouse. Create two new Station records in TimeTrex. The first station, named 'Headquarters Station', must have Type: PC, Station ID: ANY, Source: 204.174.1.100, and Description: 'Headquarters IP Restriction'. The second station, named 'Warehouse Station', must have Type: PC, Station ID: ANY, Source: 204.174.1.105, and Description: 'Warehouse IP Restriction'. Login credentials: Username: demoadmin1, Password: demo
